title: Shortcut Recipes
description: Adds secondary shortcut recipes to already pre-existing recipes.
body: ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.4-green) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod-v1.1-blue) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge/Fabric-orange) A Minecraft Forge and Fabric mod that adds secondary shortcut recipes to already pre-existing recipes. ### Example Recipe: ![minecart](https://i.imgur.com/xm091vs.png) [View All Recipes](https://michaelfarquhar.github.io/shortcut-recipes-datapack/) --- Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks.
